mapper.insert: INSERT INTO resume_template_export ( id, template_id, user_id, base_version, export_version, patch_draft_id, filename, file_path, storage_type, object_key, public_url, layout_validation_json, idempotency_key, status ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{templateId}, #{userId}, #{baseVersion}, #{exportVersion}, #{patchDraftId}, #{filename}, #{filePath}, #{storageType}, #{objectKey}, #{publicUrl}, #{layoutValidationJson}, #{idempotencyKey}, #{status} )
mapper.select: SELECT id, template_id, user_id, base_version, export_version, patch_draft_id, filename, file_path, storage_type, object_key, public_url, layout_validation_json, idempotency_key, status, created_at, updated_at FROM resume_template_export WHERE template_id = #{templateId} AND user_id = #{userId} AND idempotency_key = #{idempotencyKey}

SELECT id, template_id, user_id, base_version, export_version, patch_draft_id, filename, file_path, storage_type, object_key, public_url, layout_validation_json, idempotency_key, status, created_at, updated_at FROM resume_template_export WHERE template_id = #{templateId} AND user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY export_version DESC, created_at DESC
